# claude_workspace_member (Data Source)

Use this data source to get information about a Claude workspace member.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "claude_workspace_member" "example" {
  workspace_id = "wrkspc_01EXAMPLE"
  user_id      = "user_01EXAMPLE"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `user_id` (String) The ID of the user.
- `workspace_id` (String) The ID of the workspace.

### Read-Only

- `workspace_role` (String) The role of the member in the workspace.
